steps.title: Apply the rearrangement from the given condition
steps.content: Move the $(6-5x)$ terms to one side: $12-5=7(6-5x)-8(6-5x)$, giving $7=-(6-5x)$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The question asks for the value of $6-5x$, not for $x$ itself. Therefore the value to enter is -7.
